# Feature Request Prompt for be-vui-hoc

## Instructions
When you want to add a new feature to this project, simply provide the feature description and reference this prompt. The assistant will:
- Analyze your project structure and conventions
- Suggest the best place to implement the feature
- Follow ReactJS, TypeScript, and your project’s UI/UX patterns
- Automatically apply best practices for code, accessibility, and maintainability
- Integrate with existing components, hooks, and data structure

## Example Usage
```
[feature_request_prompt.md]
Feature: Add a new game mode for matching animal sounds
```

## Project Context
- React + TypeScript
- Modular component structure (components/levels, components/icons, etc.)
- Uses hooks, utility functions, and data from data/ and utils/
- Follows kid-friendly, accessible UI/UX
- Uses SpeechText for TTS where needed
- Follows best practices for code organization and reusability

## What the assistant should do
- Propose or implement the feature in the correct place
- Add imports, props, and state as needed
- Update or create new files/components if required
- Ensure the feature is discoverable in the UI
- Add comments and documentation if needed
- Suggest or add tests if appropriate

---
*Use this prompt for all future feature requests in this project.*
